ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county of the vaccination data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category of the vaccination data */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the vaccination data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the vaccination data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vaccination data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("vaccination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., correction, revision) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("vaccination_id")
)
